title: epilobium montanum var. carpetanum
intro: Epilobium montanum var. carpetanum, also known as alpine willowherb, is a subspecies of the Epilobium montanum plant, which is a flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Epilobium montanum var. carpetanum include reducing inflammation, improving kidney function, and supporting the urinary system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms associated with kidney and bladder problems.
